title: lastrea paucijuga
intro: Lastrea paucijuga, also known as the few-glanded lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and slender stalks. The medicinal properties of Lastrea paucijuga lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from rheumatic pain. Lastrea paucijuga is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
